steps.t: Etta, mother of Thane Radwig, is in the Mead Hall of Floodwend. You should speak with Etta.
The young Thane Radwig is in the Mead Hall of Floodwend. You should speak with Radwig.
Radwig wishes to meet you outside of Nîn-stazg, an Orc-encampment in the south-east of the Wold. You should search for Radwig near Nîn-stazg, for he w…
Siege machines can be found at Nîn-stazg to the south-east of Floodwend. You should destroy siege-weapons that you find in the woods.
Thane Radwig is on a hill overlooking Nîn-stazg. You should speak with Thane Radwig.
